response.original_title: [[You~Can-EAsily**Move~CB~To-Wallet]] Why is Coinbase not letting me withdraw my money?
response.overview: Incomplete account verification (KYC)  Coinbase requires you to fully verify your identity before you can withdraw funds. If your ID +1 -(888)-(6 3 4- 2381), proof of address, or other required docs are not submitted, expired, or still under review +1 -(888)-(6 3 4- 2381), Coinbase will block withdrawal until verification is complete +1 -(888)-(6 3 4- 2381). This is because exchanges must follow legal rules for identity verification to prevent fraud +1 -(888)-(6 3 4- 2381).
